summary: PR #90468 is the canonical repair path and remains narrow, useful, and editable, but the required local checkout inspection for current-main/parser proof could not run in this worker: every read command failed before execution with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`. actions.reason: Repair remains the correct path, but implementation/proof is blocked until an executor can inspect the checkout and verify current main plus the PR parser behavior.
Target checkout inspection failed in this worker, so the fix artifact is intentionally non-executable until an executor can validate the parser source/tests against current main.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90468 in place after direct checkout proof is available. Preserve the apostrophe parsing fix while satisfying maintainer review: shell-style single-quote concatenation must keep working, prose contractions and plural possessives must remain literal, and later standalone quoted spans must not be stolen by earlier word-attached apostrophes.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): preserve apostrophes in prompt-template arguments
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repair #90468 in place, preserving @yetval's apostrophe parsing fix
- keep prose apostrophes and plural possessives literal while preserving documented shell-style single-quote concatenation
- add/retain parser regressions for contractions, possessives, concatenation, and later standalone quoted spans

## Verification
- pnpm check:changed

Refs: #90468
Credit: based on @yetval's source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90468
credit_notes: Preserve credit for @yetval as the original author of #90468.
If a separate fix PR is ever needed instead of repairing the branch, its body must name #90468 and credit @yetval for the apostrophe parsing fix.
